# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Category

- [ ] New mindset
- [ ] Improvement to existing mindset
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI/tooling change
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] I added a clear description of the change
- [ ] I linked related issues (if any)
- [ ] I tested with Claude Code where applicable
- [ ] I verified markdown formatting and readability
- [ ] I verified internal links are valid
- [ ] I updated `README.md` if discoverability changed

## Testing Notes

List validation steps or sample commands used.
